overview: Learn with Dr. Adil is a medical exam prep platform for students, featuring persistent backend storage for all admin-managed content. The admin can add subjects, modules, MCQs, essays, short essays, and short notes — all instantly visible to every student. Students can browse modules, practice MCQs directly from any module, and review previous year questions with completion tracking.
features: Persistent Motoko backend storing all content (subjects, modules, MCQs, essays, short essays, short notes)
Admin panel (single Content Page) with sub-tabs for all content types — saves write directly to backend
Student-facing Modules page: only backend subjects shown, two-step subject→module drill-down
MCQ quiz launches directly from 'Start Practice' button — no extra tabs
PYQ archive: Essays, Short Essays, Short Notes cards with expandable modules/topics and completion checkboxes
Hidden admin access: 5-tap logo trigger + password 'Tesla369'
Neo-brutalist UI: Plus Jakarta Sans, Be Vietnam Pro, Material Symbols Outlined, custom Tailwind
Responsive layout for desktop and mobile
All admin edits instantly visible to all students after save
